title: Flodesk vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Flodesk vs Sendinblue. We break down pricing, features, and ideal use cases to help you choose the right email marketing tool.
h1: Flodesk vs Sendinblue: Detailed Comparison & Winner
intro: Flodesk and Sendinblue (now Brevo) serve different segments of the email marketing market. Flodesk focuses on design-first brands with unlimited subscribers at a flat rate, while Sendinblue emphasizes versatility with SMS, chat, and CRM capabilities. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize email aesthetics or multi-channel marketing at scale.

comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, chat, CRM, transactional API

choose_a_if: You run a visual brand and need beautifully designed emails to match your aesthetic
You want unlimited subscribers from day one at a predictable flat monthly rate
Email marketing is your primary focus and you want advanced email workflows
choose_b_if: You're starting out and want a free tier with generous limits (up to 100,000 subscribers)
You need multi-channel marketing including SMS, WhatsApp, and built-in CRM features
You want flexibility in pricing that grows with your email volume rather than flat fees

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Flodesk is better for visually-driven brands prioritizing email design, while Sendinblue excels for businesses needing multi-channel campaigns and CRM integration. Flodesk offers superior email aesthetics; Sendinblue provides broader functionality at lower entry costs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper upfront with a free tier supporting 100,000 subscribers and 300 emails daily. Flodesk starts at $38/month with no free option. However, Flodesk's flat rate makes it more economical at very high subscriber counts compared to Sendinblue's scaling costs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email data. Most email marketing tools support CSV imports, making migration straightforward. Plan your switch during a billing cycle to avoid overlap charges and test templates in your new platform before going live.
